destinations.name: Cairo
destinations.description: Step into the world's greatest open-air museum, where the legacy of pharaohs is etched into every stone and the Nile whispers ancient secrets.
destinations.experienceDescription: Discover Cairo's most iconic landmarks and museums.
destinations.guideTitle: Unveil Cairo's Secrets with a Local Expert
destinations.guideDescription: Don't just see the monuments—understand them. Our certified Egyptologists bring the ancient world to life with stories of intrigue, mystery, and the daily lives of the pharaohs.

experiences.title: Pyramids
experiences.description: Explore Egypt's iconic pyramids.

experiences.title: Grand Egyptian Museum
experiences.description: Discover thousands of ancient artifacts.

experiences.title: Egyptian Museum
experiences.description: Home to priceless treasures.

destinations.name: Aswan
destinations.description: Follow the Nile through warm Nubian hospitality, timeless temples, and golden desert landscapes in Egypt's peaceful southern jewel.
destinations.experienceDescription: Sail the Nile and explore the temples, islands, and Nubian heritage of Aswan.
destinations.guideTitle: Discover Aswan with a Local Expert
destinations.guideDescription: See the stories behind the temples and the river with a guide who knows every hidden view, local tradition, and historic path.

experiences.title: Abu Simbel Temples
experiences.description: Witness Ramses II's monumental temples carved into the rock.

experiences.title: Temple of Philae
experiences.description: Visit the island sanctuary devoted to the goddess Isis.

experiences.title: Temple of Kom Ombo
experiences.description: Explore the unique riverside double temple of Sobek and Horus.

destinations.name: Luxor
destinations.description: Walk through the heart of ancient Thebes, where grand temples, royal tombs, and the Nile reveal Egypt's most spectacular history.
destinations.experienceDescription: Discover the temples and royal tombs that made Luxor the world's greatest open-air museum.
destinations.guideDescription: Travel through Luxor with an expert who connects every temple, tomb, and monument to the people who built them.
guideFeatures: Custom Valley of the Kings visits

experiences.title: Karnak Temple
experiences.description: Explore the immense temple complex dedicated to Amun-Ra.

experiences.title: Valley of the Kings
experiences.description: Enter the richly decorated tombs of Egypt's pharaohs.

experiences.title: Temple of Hatshepsut
experiences.description: See the elegant terraced temple of Egypt's great female pharaoh.

destinations.name: Alexandria
destinations.description: Discover a coastal city shaped by Greek, Roman, and Egyptian history, with grand libraries, sea fortresses, and timeless streets.
destinations.experienceDescription: Move between the Mediterranean waterfront, classical museums, and remarkable landmarks.
destinations.guideTitle: Explore Alexandria with a Local Storyteller
destinations.guideDescription: See the layers of the ancient port city through a guide who connects its Greek, Roman, and modern identities.

experiences.title: Citadel of Qaitbay
experiences.description: Explore the 15th-century fortress overlooking the Mediterranean.

experiences.title: Bibliotheca Alexandrina
experiences.description: Visit Alexandria's landmark library and cultural center.

experiences.title: Catacombs of Kom El Shoqafa
experiences.description: Descend into an extraordinary blend of Egyptian, Greek, and Roman art.

destinations.name: Giza
destinations.heroTitle: Giza: Where Wonders Rise from the Desert
destinations.description: Stand beside the world's most famous pyramids, monumental statues, and Egypt's newest cultural landmark.
destinations.experienceDescription: Trace the stories of the pharaohs from the plateau to the great museums.
destinations.guideTitle: Read the Pyramids with an Egyptologist
destinations.guideDescription: A local guide turns the Giza plateau into a living story of engineering, ritual, and royal ambition.

experiences.title: Great Pyramid of Giza
experiences.description: See the last surviving wonder of the ancient world.

experiences.title: Great Sphinx
experiences.description: Meet the enduring guardian of the Giza plateau.

experiences.title: Grand Egyptian Museum
experiences.description: Discover a major new home for Egypt's ancient treasures.

destinations.name: Fayoum
destinations.description: A fertile oasis where lakes, waterfalls, fossils, and ancient temples meet the edge of the Western Desert.
destinations.experienceDescription: Pair nature, archaeology, and quiet desert landscapes in one memorable escape.
destinations.guideDescription: Travel with a guide who can connect the oasis's natural beauty with its pharaonic and Greco-Roman heritage.

experiences.title: Wadi El Rayan
experiences.description: Enjoy lakes, waterfalls, and wide desert scenery.

experiences.title: Medinet Madi
experiences.description: Walk through an important temple site in the Fayoum oasis.

experiences.title: Hawara Pyramid
experiences.description: Explore the remains of Amenemhat III's pyramid complex.

destinations.name: Siwa
destinations.heroTitle: Siwa: A Desert Oasis of Timeless Calm
destinations.description: Escape to an oasis of salt lakes, palm groves, mud-brick architecture, and distinct Amazigh culture near Egypt's western border.
destinations.experienceDescription: Slow down with desert views, local traditions, and restorative natural pools.
destinations.guideTitle: Experience Siwa with a Local Guide
destinations.guideDescription: A local guide helps you experience the oasis respectfully, from its landscapes to its deep-rooted traditions.

experiences.title: Siwa Oasis
experiences.description: Explore palm groves, salt lakes, and the oasis landscape.

destinations.name: South Sinai
destinations.heroTitle: South Sinai: Mountains, Reefs, and Desert Colour
destinations.description: Journey through dramatic desert canyons and the Red Sea's famous underwater landscapes in Egypt's adventurous peninsula.
destinations.experienceDescription: Combine diving, desert hikes, and remarkable natural formations.
destinations.guideDescription: Plan desert and coast experiences with a local guide who understands the routes, seasons, and culture of Sinai.

experiences.title: Blue Hole
experiences.description: See one of the Red Sea's most celebrated dive sites.

experiences.title: Coloured Canyon
experiences.description: Walk through spectacular sandstone walls shaped by wind and time.

attractions.name: Pyramids of Giza
attractions.description: The last surviving wonder of the ancient world — three colossal pyramids built for pharaohs Khufu, Khafre, and Menkaure, standing for over 4,500 years.

attractions.name: Great Sphinx of Giza
attractions.description: A monumental limestone statue with the body of a lion and the face of a pharaoh, guarding the Giza plateau for millennia.

attractions.name: Egyptian Museum
attractions.description: Home to the world's largest collection of ancient Egyptian antiquities, including the golden mask of Tutankhamun.

attractions.name: Grand Egyptian Museum
attractions.description: The world's largest archaeological museum near the Giza Pyramids, showcasing over 100,000 ancient Egyptian artifacts.

attractions.name: Khan el-Khalili Bazaar
attractions.description: A famous medieval Islamic bazaar in the heart of Cairo, filled with spices, jewelry, souvenirs, and traditional cafés.

attractions.name: Citadel of Saladin
attractions.description: A medieval Islamic fortification on Mokattam Hill, home to the stunning Muhammad Ali Mosque and panoramic city views.

attractions.name: Coptic Cairo
attractions.description: An ancient district containing some of Egypt's oldest Christian churches, the Ben Ezra Synagogue, and rich religious heritage.

attractions.name: Serapeum of Saqqara
attractions.description: A mysterious underground burial complex containing giant black granite sarcophagi of the sacred Apis Bulls.

attractions.name: Karnak Temple
attractions.description: The largest ancient religious site in the world — a breathtaking complex of temples, chapels, pylons, and obelisks built over 2,000 years.

attractions.name: Luxor Temple
attractions.description: A magnificent temple on the east bank of the Nile, illuminated at night — one of the most photogenic sites in Egypt.

attractions.name: Valley of the Kings
attractions.description: The royal necropolis where pharaohs of the New Kingdom were buried in elaborately decorated tombs, including Tutankhamun's.

attractions.name: Temple of Hatshepsut
attractions.description: A stunning terraced mortuary temple carved into the cliffs of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to Egypt's greatest female pharaoh.

attractions.name: Temple of Medinet Habu
attractions.description: A well-preserved mortuary temple of Ramses III featuring enormous pylons and some of the finest reliefs in Egypt.

attractions.name: Luxor Museum
attractions.description: An elegant museum on the Nile corniche housing a carefully curated collection of artifacts from the Theban region.

attractions.name: Nile Felucca Cruise
attractions.description: A traditional sailing boat ride on the Nile at sunset — the most relaxing and iconic experience in Luxor.

attractions.name: Hot Air Balloon Ride
attractions.description: Soar over the West Bank temples and Valley of the Kings at sunrise for a breathtaking bird's-eye view of ancient Thebes.

attractions.name: Abu Simbel Temples
attractions.description: Two massive rock temples built by Ramses II — a UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of Egypt's most awe-inspiring monuments.

attractions.name: Temple of Philae
attractions.description: A beautiful island temple complex dedicated to the goddess Isis, rescued from the rising Nile and reassembled stone by stone.

attractions.name: Temple of Kom Ombo
attractions.description: A unique double temple on the Nile banks dedicated to both Sobek the crocodile god and Horus the Elder.

attractions.name: Nubian Village
attractions.description: Colorful villages on the west bank of the Nile offering authentic Nubian food, music, and traditional hospitality.

attractions.name: Aswan High Dam
attractions.description: One of the world's largest embankment dams creating Lake Nasser — an engineering marvel with panoramic desert views.

attractions.name: Elephantine Island
attractions.description: A Nile island with an ancient history spanning 3,000 years, featuring ruins of temples, a nilometer, and a small museum.

attractions.name: Nile Sunset Felucca
attractions.description: Sail on the Nile past the granite boulders and islands of Aswan as the sun sets over the Sahara — utterly magical.

attractions.name: Temple of Edfu
attractions.description: The best-preserved ancient temple in Egypt dedicated to the falcon god Horus — its hieroglyphic reliefs are extraordinary.

attractions.name: Shali Fortress (Siwa Oasis)
attractions.description: An ancient mud-brick fortress in Siwa built from karshif (salt-rich clay). It stands as a labyrinth of ruins offering panoramic desert views.

attractions.name: Wadi Al-Hitan (Valley of Whales)
attractions.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site in Fayoum desert containing hundreds of spectacular fossilized skeletons of primitive whales from 40 million years ago.

attractions.name: El Nayzak Lake (Marsa Alam)
attractions.description: A stunning natural pool formed by a meteor strike on the Red Sea coast, featuring turquoise waters that stay warm and calm year-round.

attractions.name: Colored Canyon (Sinai)
attractions.description: A spectacular natural labyrinth of narrow rocky gorges in Sinai, displaying beautiful swirls of red, yellow, and magenta sandstone.

attractions.name: White Desert (Farafra)
attractions.description: A surreal desert of snow-white chalk rock formations carved by wind into spectacular abstract shapes like mushrooms and towers.

attractions.name: Wadi El Gemal (Marsa Alam)
attractions.description: The Valley of the Camels, a pristine national park with sandy beaches, coral reefs, desert wildlife, and ancient Roman emerald mines.

attractions.name: Blue Lagoon (Dahab)
attractions.description: A peaceful wind-swept sanctuary of shallow turquoise water, ideal for kite-surfing and camping in traditional Bedouin bamboo huts.

attractions.name: Siwa Salt Lakes
attractions.description: Crystalline turquoise hot-spring salt pools where you float effortlessly due to extremely high salt concentration, surrounded by salt shores.

attractions.name: Black Desert (Bahariya)
attractions.description: A dramatic charcoal-colored landscape of volcanic hills topped with black basalt, contrasting beautifully with golden sands.

attractions.name: St. Catherine Mountains
attractions.description: High rocky peaks of Sinai featuring organic olive gardens, ancient hermits paths, and the sacred Mt. Sinai summit.

attractions.name: Baron Empain Palace (Cairo)
attractions.description: A historic Hindu-temple inspired mansion built in Heliopolis by a Belgian industrialist, featuring mystical architecture.

attractions.name: Abu Galum Protected Area
attractions.description: A stunning Sinai nature reserve squeezed between high granite mountains and deep blue waters of the Red Sea reef.

attractions.name: Citadel of Qaitbay
attractions.description: A 15th-century fortress built on Alexandria's Mediterranean waterfront near the site of the ancient Pharos lighthouse.

attractions.name: Bibliotheca Alexandrina
attractions.description: Alexandria's modern library and cultural complex, created in tribute to the ancient Library of Alexandria.

attractions.name: Catacombs of Kom El Shoqafa
attractions.description: A remarkable underground necropolis where Egyptian, Greek, and Roman artistic traditions meet.

attractions.name: Alexandria National Museum
attractions.description: A museum tracing Alexandria's long history through artifacts from the Pharaonic, Greek, Roman, and modern eras.

attractions.name: Greco-Roman Museum
attractions.description: Discover sculptures, coins, and everyday objects from Alexandria's influential Greco-Roman period.

attractions.name: Montaza Palace
attractions.description: A royal palace and gardens on the Mediterranean coast, known for its elegant architecture and sea views.

attractions.name: Great Pyramid of Giza
attractions.description: The largest pyramid at Giza and the only surviving wonder of the ancient world.

attractions.name: Great Sphinx of Giza
attractions.description: The iconic limestone guardian with a lion's body and a royal human head.

attractions.name: Grand Egyptian Museum
attractions.description: A vast museum complex near the pyramids showcasing Egypt's extraordinary archaeological heritage.

attractions.name: Pyramid of Djoser
attractions.description: The famous Step Pyramid at Saqqara, widely considered the earliest large-scale stone monument in Egypt.

attractions.name: Red Pyramid
attractions.description: A monumental pyramid built for Sneferu at Dahshur and one of Egypt's earliest true smooth-sided pyramids.

attractions.name: Wadi El Rayan
attractions.description: A protected desert landscape of lakes, waterfalls, dunes, and birdlife southwest of Fayoum.

attractions.name: Medinet Madi
attractions.description: An ancient temple site in Fayoum with structures dedicated to the cobra goddess Renenutet.

attractions.name: Hawara Pyramid
attractions.description: The pyramid complex of Amenemhat III near Hawara, part of Fayoum's rich Middle Kingdom heritage.

attractions.name: Siwa Oasis
attractions.description: A serene oasis landscape of palms, lakes, springs, and traditional mud-brick settlements.

attractions.name: Blue Hole
attractions.description: A renowned Red Sea dive site near Dahab, known for its dramatic blue-water sinkhole and reefs.

attractions.name: Coloured Canyon
attractions.description: A narrow Sinai canyon with layered sandstone walls shaped into striking colours and formations.
